mapper.select: SELECT DATE(n.create_time) AS d, COALESCE(SUM(n.like_count), 0) AS likes, COALESCE(SUM(n.comment_count), 0) AS comments, COALESCE(SUM(n.view_count), 0) AS views FROM web_note n WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND n.create_time >= #{startTime} AND n.create_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(n.create_time) ORDER BY d

SELECT grp.name AS name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ( SELECT COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(c2.title), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(cp.title), ''), CASE TRIM(IFNULL(n.note_type, '')) WHEN '0' THEN '图文' WHEN '1' THEN '视频' WHEN '2' THEN '视频' WHEN '3' THEN 'Live图' ELSE '其他' END ) AS name FROM web_note n LEFT JOIN web_category c2 ON TRIM(IFNULL(n.cid, '')) != '' AND CONCAT(c2.id, '') = TRIM(n.cid) LEFT JOIN web_category cp ON TRIM(IFNULL(n.cpid, '')) != '' AND CONCAT(cp.id, '') = TRIM(n.cpid) WHERE n.deleted = 0 AND n.audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND n.create_time >= #{startTime} AND n.create_time < #{endTime} ) grp GROUP BY grp.name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.content, n.note_cover as noteCover, n.note_cover_height as noteCoverHeight, n.cid, n.cpid, n.uid, n.urls, n.tags, n.pinned, n.audit_status as auditStatus, n.note_type as noteType, n.status, n.like_count as likeCount, n.view_count as viewCount, n.time, n.province, n.city, n.district, n.address, u.username, u.avatar FROM web_note n LEFT JOIN web_user u ON n.uid = u.id WHERE n.audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND n.deleted = 0 AND (n.city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cityName}, '%') OR n.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cityName}, '%')) ORDER BY n.update_time DESC
